body:
Got 4 weapon icons in review with 64 candidates each. Need help browsing these URLs to pick the best frame index (0-63) for each. I can't view images.

1) Shotgun: frame_{0-63}.png at https://backblaze.pixellab.ai/file/pixellab-characters/objects/cc4c304f-c805-41e2-b1b6-6e7e47fcb9fc/2605eb59-c3a3-408c-a78d-c0bf58ae7aeb/rotations/
2) Grenade Launcher: same path with 9d6f9d90-781b-40a1-9104-e0249ce41476
3) Ricochet Disc: same path with e42ce20e-d4d3-4e1e-819e-3b6318329336
4) Proximity Mine: same path with b1ca72f0-e413-419c-b047-4955ecc24cda

Reply with indices like: shotgun=3, grenade_launcher=12, ricochet_disc=7, mine=0
